SEARCH
Package com.stevenlagoy.presidency.core

Class Manager

java.lang.Object
com.stevenlagoy.presidency.core.Manager
All Implemented Interfaces:
Jsonic<Manager>, Repr<Manager>
Direct Known Subclasses:
CharacterManager, DemographicsManager, Engine, EventManager, GraphicsManager, LanguageManager, MapManager, NameManager, TimeManager
public abstract class Manager extends Object implements Repr<Manager>, Jsonic<Manager>
Abstract class for game Managers, like MapManager, CharacterManager, etc. Managers should hold an internal ManagerState which tracks the state of the Manager. Any class extending Manager should set the ManagerState to INACTIVE when instantiated.
